CONTENT.Club career: Coming through the youth ranks of the Royale Union Saint-Gilloise, of which he captained the under-21 side, Ilyes Ziani signed his first professional contract with the club from the Belgian capital on in August 2021.Ziani made his professional debut for Union SG on the 15 December 2021, replacing Dante Vanzeir during a 2–0 away Division 1A win against Zulte Waregem. The newly promoted team from Saint-Gilles was then enjoying a remarkable spell back in the First Division after 48 years, with Union sitting well on top of the league after the first half of the season.On 31 May 2023, Ziani signed a two-year contract with Standard Liège after playing for their second team SL16 FC on loan in the previous season.
CONTENT.External links: Ilyes Ziani at SoccerwayRoyale Union Saint-Gilloise profile Archived 18 December 2021 at the Wayback Machine
CONTENT.International career: Born in Belgium, Ziani is of Moroccan descent. He was called up to the Morocco U20s for a set of friendlies in September 2022.

SUMMARY: Ilyes Ziani (born 20 June 2003) is a professional footballer who plays for Standard Liège. Born in Belgium, he is a youth international for Morocco.
